1000624710.english: No, no, if you're a K-member of Armored Maiden, it's a different story~
1000624710.korean: 아니아니, 아머드 메이든의 K대원이라면 이야기가 좀 다르지~

1000624712.english: Send it straight to Feather- Huh?

1000624714.english: Huh. Looks like it's broken. Looks good.

1000624716.english: Oh, this. The communication is completely down?

1000624720.english: Yeah. Why is it like this?

1000624721.english: Um... Oh, I heard that the Secret Network server was expanded. Is that why?
1000624721.korean: 음... 아, 시크릿 네트워크 서버 확장한댔었는데 그것 때문인가?

1000624722.english: That's an internal network, what does that have to do with communications?

1000624725.english: It's nothing serious. It's just that the communication is down...
1000624725.korean: 별 일은 아냐. 그냥 통신이 먹통이라서...

1000624728.english: Hmm, really. I can't pick up a signal at all.
1000624728.korean: 흠, 진짜네. 아예 신호가 안 잡혀.

1000624729.english: It could just be that the sensitivity is off for a moment.
1000624729.korean: 그냥 잠깐 감도가 안좋은 걸수도 있잖아.

1000624730.english: It’s not like the signal is weak, but if it’s completely dead, that’s a bit of a problem.
1000624730.korean: 신호가 약한 것도 아니고 아예 먹통이면 좀 문제가 있지.

1000624731.english: I'm going back to the port. Pack your bags.

1000624733.english: I'll give you five minutes. No more talking.

1000624736.english: ......Pack your weapons, not your luggage. Hurry.

1000624742.english: To think you suddenly popped out and attacked...

1000624743.english: Ah, Captain. Did you find out anything?

1000624744.english: I'm not a technician, so what would I know just by looking at it?
1000624744.korean: 내가 기술자도 아니고 봐서 뭘 알겠냐.

1000624745.english: I just realized that the weapon system was slightly different from the standard security AGS I usually see.
1000624745.korean: 그냥 자주보던 일반적인 경비 AGS랑 무기체계가 조금 다르다는 것만 알겠더라.

1000624746.english: Anyway, communications are paralyzed and it's an enemy raid. I'll change clothes immediately and return.
1000624746.korean: 어쨌든 통신 마비에 적습이야. 바로 환복하고 복귀한다.

1000624749.english: I just came out wearing my swimsuit!

1000624751.english: Did you pack everything? Of course-

1000624755.english: Where the hell does it come from?!

1000624756.english: Stop talking and prepare for battle!

1000624758.english: This won't do, Captain! There are too many!

1000624759.english: If this continues, we'll be completely surrounded!

1000624760.english: Didn't I teach you not to say it can't be done that easily?
1000624760.korean: 그렇게 쉽게 안된다고 하지 말라고 내가 가르쳤냐, 안가르쳤냐!

1000624761.english: Catch the guys who are flying around with their mouths shut! I'll stop the rest!
1000624761.korean: 입 다물고 날아다니는 녀석들부터 잡아! 나머지는 내가 막는다!

1000624763.english: I'll take care of it! Kali, you blow up the guys with the strongest firepower first!
1000624763.korean: 내가 맡을게! 칼리 너는 화력 센 녀석들부터 날려버려!

1000624766.english: No... this is just a mortar.

1000624767.english: Looks like you need some help?

1000624769.english: If it's not too much trouble, I'll show off a bit...

1000624770.english: You came just in time. Let's deal with those together.
1000624770.korean: 딱 맞춰 와줬어. 같이 저것들 좀 처리하자.

1000624773.english: Does anyone know what's going on right now?
1000624773.korean: 혹시 지금 상황 파악되는 사람 있나?

1000624775.english: I was just coming here and saw you guys being attacked so I helped you.
1000624775.korean: 이쪽으로 오다가 너희가 공격받고 있길래 도와줬을 뿐이야.

1000624776.english: Then it's a common thing. By the way, communication is also down right now.
1000624776.korean: 그럼 피차일반이군. 참고로 지금 통신도 먹통이야.

1000624777.english: Yeah, really. The signal isn't transmitting at all.
1000624777.korean: 지, 진짜에요. 신호가 아예 발신이 안 돼요.

1000624778.english: Then I'm worried about the Commander... What are you going to do?

1000624779.english: I recommend retreating to the port and reorganizing.
1000624779.korean: 나는 일단 항구로 후퇴해서 재정비하는 걸 추천하지.

1000624780.english: Well, then what about you, Commander!

1000624781.english: I don't even know where you are!

1000624782.english: So you're going to the port?

1000624783.english: There's no way to communicate, and I can't go looking for the Commander whose whereabouts I don't even know while I'm under attack from an unknown enemy.
1000624783.korean: 통신도 안되고, 정체불명의 적한테 공격받는 도중에 어디계신지도 모를 사령관님을 찾아 헤맬 수는 없어.

1000624785.english: And I wish we were the only ones attacked, but that's unlikely.
1000624785.korean: 그리고 우리만 공격당한 거면 좋겠지만, 그럴 가능성은 낮지.

1000624786.english: Not only the port, but also the units in operation will be attacked simultaneously.
1000624786.korean: 항구뿐만 아니라 작전중인 부대들도 동시에 공격받고 있을 거야.

1000624789.english: Even if you're impatient, nothing will happen.

1000624791.english: I'll take our kids and go around the area looking for isolated units or commanders.
1000624791.korean: 나는 우리 애들 데리고 주변을 돌면서 고립된 부대나 사령관님을 찾아볼게.

1000624792.english: The lady should take them back to the port, report it, and then organize a search party.
1000624792.korean: 아줌마는 쟤네 데리고 항구로 돌아가서 보고한 다음에 수색대를 꾸리던지 해.

1000624794.english: Oh, yes, yes. Mr. Impet Yarn (Jin).

1000624795.english: Got it all sorted out? Then let's get started.

1000624796.english: Wait a minute. See that thing covered in a tarp over there? It's ammunition, so take it.
1000624796.korean: 잠깐. 저기 방수포에 덮힌 거 보이지? 탄약이니까 가져가.

1000624798.english: That would be helpful. What's up with that?

1000624799.english: Our sergeant was slacking off, so we made a fuss.

1000624800.english: I came here to get that too.
1000624800.korean: 여기 온것도 저거 가지러 온 거고.

1000624801.english: But, still... didn't I pay for the meal a little while ago...?
1000624801.korean: 그, 그래도... 좀 전에 저, 밥값 했지 않습니까...?

1000624803.english: If I hadn't kept my weapons in good condition because I was always rolling around, I would have really ended my military life.
1000624803.korean: 맨날 뒹굴거린다고 무기 정비도 안해놨었으면 진짜 군생활 끝내주려고 했는데 말야.

1000624807.english: Did you hear everything? We're going into the forest.

1000624808.english: Oh my... what is this during vacation?

1000624809.english: Not only is the situation already bad, but they're also conducting a search...

1000624810.english: Don't talk nonsense and get ready.

1000624811.english: Because it might be a bigger deal than you think.

1000624813.english: Oh, Spriggan, bring me that ammo box.
1000624813.korean: 아, 스프리건은 저 탄약 박스 들고 와라.

1000624815.english: Then why did you come straight out of the dorm wearing a swimsuit?
1000624815.korean: 그러게 왜 숙소에서 바로 수영복 입고 나왔어?

1000624817.english: Then let's go. Let's go towards the sound of battle.
1000624817.korean: 그럼 가자. 전투 소리가 들리는 쪽으로 간다.

1000624820.english: Ugh... If you get hit hard enough, don't run away!
1000624820.korean: 으... 열받게 좀 맞다보면 도망가지 말임다!

1000624821.english: It seems like they're trying to block our path... ah!
1000624821.korean: 꼭 우리 경로를 방해하려는 것 같... 앗!

1000624826.english: Oh, you're my ally! Come forward!

1000624829.english: Uh... no way... are you alone...?

1000624830.english: There was nothing to worry about. I just got separated from my squad during the melee.
1000624830.korean: 걱정하시는 일은 없었습니다. 난전 중에 분대와 떨어졌거든요.

1000624831.english: ...I can only hope that everyone is safe.

1000624832.english: Still, since the sergeant is here, I can breathe a sigh of relief. It seems like we're...
1000624832.korean: 그래도 병장님이 오셨으니 한 숨 돌리겠네요. 저희끼린 아무래도...

1000624833.english: Yes. Let's move for now. Since the communication is down, we'll head west for now.
1000624833.korean: 네. 일단 이동하죠. 통신이 먹통이니 일단 서쪽을 향해 이동하겠습니다.

1000624836.english: How many attacks has this been already?

1000624838.english: Corporal, do you have any magazines? I have one left...
1000624838.korean: 상병님. 탄창 좀 있으심까? 저 한 개 남았는데...

1000624841.english: Ahaha, of course I know! The atmosphere was a bit heavy, so I just cracked a joke. Haha...
1000624841.korean: 아하하, 당연히 알지 말임다! 분위기가 너무 무거워서 농담 좀 해봤슴다. 하하...

1000624842.english: I think we can save some bullets.
1000624842.korean: 총알은 좀 아껴도 될 것 같습니다.

1000624843.english: These AGSs... it looks like they aren't actively attacking.
1000624843.korean: 이 AGS들... 아무래도 적극적으로 공격하지는 않는 모양이에요.

1000624844.english: Still, the fact that it keeps appearing...

1000624846.english: I will use the last of the foamed concrete!

1000624847.english: There is no need for that.

1000624849.english: Machines, kneel before the majesty of the Sage!
1000624849.korean: 기계들이여, 본좌의 위광 앞에 무릎 꿇거라!

1000624850.english: Wow, aren't you the Demon Lord!

1000624852.english: Hehe. Now that you have entered my tent, you will be safe.
1000624852.korean: 후후. 본좌의 장막에 들어온 이상, 너희는 안전할 것이다.

1000624853.english: Thank you. I was just about to run out of ammunition...
1000624853.korean: 감사해요. 마침 탄약이 다 떨어져 가는 참이었는데...

1000624854.english: But why the tone of voice...

1000624856.english: Ah, um... I'm used to this when fighting...
1000624856.korean: 아, 저... 싸울 때는 이게 익숙해서요...

1000624858.english: No way! It was really cool!

1000624859.english: Could you accept me as a subordinate as well?

1000624860.english: Uh, well... right now I'm a magical girl, and I'm just playing the Demon Lord for a brief moment...
1000624860.korean: 그, 그게... 지금 저는 마법소녀고, 마왕은 이번에만 잠깐 하는 거라서요...

1000624861.english: Huh? You act like the Demon King just fine when the Commander asks you to.
1000624861.korean: 예에? 사령관님이 해달라고 하시면 마왕님 연기 잘만 해주시면서 말임다.

1000624863.english: Hehe... This Brownie knows everything that happens in Orca.
1000624863.korean: 후후... 이 브라우니, 오르카에서 벌어지는 일은 모르는 게 없지 말임다.

1000624864.english: The magical girls trying to put a swimsuit on the Demon Lord is also all-
1000624864.korean: 마법소녀 분들이 마왕님한테 수영복을 입혀보려고 하는 것도 다-

1000624866.english: How did you come to apply, Faucre?

1000624868.english: Yes. I was at the port when I was attacked by AGSs.
1000624868.korean: 네. 항구에 있다가 AGS들의 공격을 받았어요.

1000624869.english: Because I heard that others might be isolated, I went alone to rescue them...
1000624869.korean: 다른 분들이 고립되어있을 거라고 해서, 저는 혼자 그분들을 구하러...

1000624870.english: Then, what about the port? Almost only non-combat personnel remain!
1000624870.korean: 그, 그럼 항구는 어쩜까? 거의 비전투 인원만 남아있지 말임다!

1000624871.english: It's okay. Everyone is fighting hard to protect the harbor.
1000624871.korean: 괜찮아요. 다들 항구를 지키기 위해 열심히 싸우고 있으니까요.

1000624872.english: Both BaekTo and Momo said that if you are a true magical girl, you must trust your comrades.
1000624872.korean: 백토도 모모도, 진정한 마법소녀라면 동료를 믿어야 한다고 했어요.

1000624874.english: Then, can you move with us?
1000624874.korean: 그럼 저희랑 같이 움직여주실 수 있나요?

1000624875.english: We ran out of ammunition, so our firepower weakened.

1000624876.english: Wow! Then, is the Demon Lord going to lead the way?

1000624878.english: Don't be afraid! The Master is with you!

1000624881.english: External armor damage rate 2%. Minor damage. Estimated mission duration, 8 hours 23 minutes 49 seconds.
1000624881.korean: 외부 장갑 손상률 2%. 하찮은 손상. 예상 임무 지속 가능 시간, 8시간 23분 49초.

1000624882.english: ...External armor damage rate, 37%. Recalculating estimated mission duration.
1000624882.korean: ...외부 장갑 손상률, 37%. 예상 임무 지속 가능 시간 재연산중.

1000624883.english: Go, Topdol! Keep an eye on them while your older sister works!
1000624883.korean: 가라 탑돌아! 누나가 일하는 동안 견제해!

1000624884.english: Tommy, just bear with it a little longer! I'll fix it right away!

1000624887.english: There is a risk of injury to the T-9 Gremlin unit undergoing field repairs.
1000624887.korean: 야전 수리중인 T-9 그렘린 개체가 부상당할 위험이 있음.

1000624888.english: But what can you do— Ah, the pagoda pilgrimage!

1000624890.english: External armor damage rate, 58%. Estimated mission duration, 1 minute 17 seconds.
1000624890.korean: 외부 장갑 손상률, 58%. 예상 임무 지속 가능 시간, 1분 17초.

1000624891.english: Request the immediate eviction of the T-9 Gremlin units.
1000624891.korean: T-9 그렘린 개체에게 신속한 퇴거를 요청.

1000624892.english: No! It'll be a disaster if this gets breached!

1000624893.english: I have to protect it no matter what!

1000624895.english: Tommy Walker. Move to a location where you can block the intruder's path before function deactivation.
1000624895.korean: 토미워커. 기능 정지 전 침입자의 경로를 막을 수 있는 곳으로 이동.

1000624896.english: Estimated movement delay: 5 minutes 16 seconds. It is recommended to evacuate quickly and establish a second line of defense in accordance with the manual prepared by the highest commanding officer.
1000624896.korean: 예상 이동 지연시간 5분 16초. 신속히 퇴거 후 최고 명령권자가 작성한 매뉴얼에 따라 2차 방어선 구축을 권함.

1000624901.english: We have blunted the spearhead of the enemy AGS. We can retreat safely.
1000624901.korean: 적 AGS들의 예봉을 꺾었습니다. 안전하게 퇴각이 가능합니다.

1000624903.english: That was seriously, seriously cool! I went "whoosh" and they all... in one go!
1000624903.korean: 진짜, 진짜 멋있었어! 슈왁 하니까 바로 쟤네들이 한 번에...!

1000624904.english: Ugh... If only I hadn't lost my heart to the Commander...
1000624904.korean: 으으... 사령관님한테 마음을 빼앗기기 전이었다면, 나는...

1000624905.english: ...time for retreat is being wasted due to unnecessary discourse from the T-9 Gremlin entity.
1000624905.korean: ...T-9 그렘린 개체의 불필요한 담화 때문에 퇴각을 위한 시간이 낭비되고 있습니다.

1000624906.english: Based on the data collected so far, it is believed to be a token of appreciation from the Gremlin entity.
1000624906.korean: 그동안의 데이터 취합 결과, T-9 그렘린 개체의 감사표시라고 판단됨.

1000624908.english: As expected, there's no one else but Tommy~

1000624909.english: Anomalies are detected in Tommy Walker 17's behavior.

1000624910.english: Compared to the existing Tommy Walker model, it shows high computational power and language skills.
1000624910.korean: 기존 토미워커 모델에 비해 높은 연산능력과 언어 구사능력이 보입니다.

1000624911.english: We recommend that you perform a self-verification to check if there is a problem.
1000624911.korean: 문제가 생긴 것은 아닌지 자가검증을 진행하는 것을 추천드립니다.

1000624912.english: Oh, that? This Tommy and I work together often.
1000624912.korean: 아, 그거? 이 토미는 나랑 자주 같이 일하거든.

1000624913.english: But since we need someone to talk to, I added more memory to the A.I. module.
1000624913.korean: 그런데 말상대가 좀 필요하니까, A.I. 모듈에 메모리를 증설했어.

1000624914.english: Tommy Walker thanks the T-9 Gremlin entity.
1000624914.korean: 토미워커, T-9 그렘린 개체에게 감사를 표함.

1000624917.english: It was also because Tommy made his own judgment with his increased computational power that he was able to protect this place.
1000624917.korean: 여기를 지켜낼 수 있었던 것도 늘어난 연산 능력으로 토미가 스스로 판단했기 때문이야.

1000624918.english: Enemy reinforcements have arrived. Prepare for battle.
1000624918.korean: 적의 증원 도착. 전투 준비를 권함.

1000624919.english: Great! If you have shade, you can block it well!
1000624919.korean: 좋았어! 쉐이드가 있으면 충분히 막아낼 수 있을 거야!

1000624921.english: Confirmed functional shutdown due to the final intruder, Tommy Walker's downward strike.
1000624921.korean: 마지막 침입자, 토미워커의 내려치기로 인한 기능 정지를 확인.

1000624922.english: Other lines of defense have also been completed.

1000624923.english: Wow, we stopped it among ourselves?

1000624924.english: The captain will praise you greatly!

1000624925.english: However, communication has not yet been restored.

1000624926.english: The Commander's safety is still unknown, so Fortune is working to restore communication.
1000624926.korean: 사령관님의 안위도 확인되지 않는 상황이라, 포츈님이 통신 복구 작업중입니다.

1000624927.english: Oh, that's right. What about the Commander?!

1000624929.english: Uh, shouldn't we go by ourselves?
1000624929.korean: 우, 우리끼리라도 가봐야 하는 거 아냐?

1000624930.english: T-9 Gremlin entity, position shooter recommended.
1000624930.korean: T-9 그렘린 개체, 위치 사수를 권장.

1000624931.english: The current mission is to defend the port. There's no telling when another intruder attack will occur.
1000624931.korean: 현재의 임무는 항구 수호. 언제 또 침입자의 공격이 재개될지 예측되지 않는 상황.

1000624932.english: It is more efficient to entrust the safety of the highest commanding officer to personnel who have gone out to provide support.
1000624932.korean: 최고 명령권자의 안전 확보는 외부로 지원을 나간 인원에게 맡기는 것이 효율적.

1000624933.english: That's the right decision. They'll also believe we'll defend the port, and thanks to that, they'll be able to focus all their energy on finding you, Commander.
1000624933.korean: 옳은 판단입니다. 그들도 우리가 항구를 지켜낼 것이라고 생각할테고, 그 덕분에 사령관님을 찾기 위해 전력을 다할 수 있을겁니다.

1000624934.english: But if I just sit here and do nothing... Huh?!
1000624934.korean: 그렇다고 이렇게 아무것도 안하고 있기에는... 어?!

1000624935.english: The enemy is not identified. Please refrain from pranks that could cause confusion in this situation.
1000624935.korean: 적은 식별되지 않습니다. 이런 상황에서 혼란을 줄 수 있는 장난은 지양-

1000624936.english: Look at this! I can connect to Steel Line Online!

1000624937.english: It is impossible to explain the phenomenon due to a lack of data.
1000624937.korean: 데이터 부족으로 인해 해당 현상에 대한 설명, 불가능.

1000624939.english: The guy attacking us right now is interfering with the external network. That's why the communications are a mess.
1000624939.korean: 지금 우리를 공격하는 녀석은 외부망을 간섭하는거야. 그래서 통신이 엉망이 된거고.

1000624940.english: However, Steel Line Online and S-Jungge are using the Orca internal network!
1000624940.korean: 하지만 스틸라인 온라인과 스정게는 오르카 내부망을 이용하고 있어!

1000624941.english: If you use this, you'll be able to temporarily restore the network!
1000624941.korean: 이걸 이용하면 임시로 통신망을 복구할 수 있을 거야!

1000624942.english: It’s not a bad idea, but I don’t think the T-9 Gremlin unit would have such technology.
1000624942.korean: 나쁘지 않은 발상입니다만, T-9 그렘린 개체에게 그런 기술이 있을 것 같지는 않습니다.

1000624943.english: Of course I need help! I'm going to go find Talonfeather and Yuumi.
1000624943.korean: 당연히 도움을 받아야지! 탈론페더랑 유미를 찾으러 갈 거야.

1000624945.english: I'm going to save the world with a game!

1000624946.english: Incomprehensible. This mission is not about saving the world.
1000624946.korean: 이해 불능. 해당 임무는 세상을 구하는 것이 아님.

1000624948.english: Tommy still has a long way to go, doesn't he?

1000624949.english: Offensive remarks. Request the T-9 Gremlin to retract the statement.
1000624949.korean: 불쾌한 언사. T-9 그렘린 개체에게 해당 발언의 철회를 요청.

1000624952.english: What kind of car is this?

1000624954.english: Do you have anything else to say?

1000624961.english: The unstable communication must have been the fault of the guy leading those AGSs.
1000624961.korean: 통신이 불안정했던 것도 저 AGS들을 이끄는 녀석의 짓이었겠군.

1000624962.english: It could be a fake communication.

1000624963.english: Let's get moving. If we're caught by the pursuers, we'll be completely surrounded.
1000624963.korean: 일단 움직이자. 추격대에게 따라잡히면 완전히 포위당하게 돼.

1000624964.english: If you're lucky, you might encounter a Steel Line or Valhalla squad.
1000624964.korean: 운이 좋으면 스틸라인이나 발할라 분대를 만날 수 있을거야.

1000624966.english: There's no other way. We have to conserve firepower as much as possible.
1000624966.korean: 별 수 없어. 최대한 화력을 아껴야해.

1000624967.english: Let's move. Just deal with the guys that follow us.

1000624969.english: ...he said he was sorry to me.

1000624972.english: Let's run away for now. We have to join up with the other agents.
1000624972.korean: 일단 도망가자. 다른 대원들이랑 합류해야 하니까.

1000624973.english: Vanilla. Cover until the Elven and Dark Elven bypass.
1000624973.korean: 바닐라. 엘븐이랑 다크엘븐이 우회할 때까지 엄호해.

1000624974.english: Harpyia, save your ammo. KeumRan, protect me.
1000624974.korean: 하르페이아는 탄약을 아껴. 금란, 나를 지켜줘.

1000624977.english: It's okay. Let's take a breather first.

1000624978.english: I think I need to take a break.

1000624980.english: Yeah, I can hear it too.

1000624984.english: And Snow Feather and Sunny... even the robot Vanilla mentioned.
1000624984.korean: 그리고 스노우 페더와 써니... 바닐라가 말한 로봇까지.

1000624989.english: ...You've been brainwashed. Or is it mind control?

1000624990.english: In that case, there must be someone who did the brainwashing.

1000624991.english: So... why are they attacking us?

1000624994.english: This situation is much more dangerous than I thought. We must quickly rejoin the main force.
1000624994.korean: 생각보다 훨씬 위험한 상황이야. 어서 본대와 합류해야 해.

1000624996.english: It may be risky, but please find a way to break through the encirclement while taking the lead.
1000624996.korean: 위험하겠지만 선행하면서 포위망을 뚫을 경로를 찾아줘.

1000625002.english: So where do you think we are now?
1000625002.korean: 그럼 지금 여기는 어디쯤인 것 같아?

1000625003.english: Since we kept moving through the forest, what the Dark Elven said must be true.
1000625003.korean: 계속 숲에서 이동했으니까 다크엘븐의 말이 맞겠지.

1000625005.english: ...I can't help it. Everything has to stop.

1000625006.english: Yeah, we're going to break through towards the port.

1000625007.english: That's the most likely way to succeed right now. Everyone, report back on the situation.
1000625007.korean: 지금은 그게 가장 성공할 확률이 높아. 다들 잔탄 상황 보고해.

1000625008.english: Okay, I'm glad I heard that.

1000625010.english: I figured this one had a better chance of survival than that. That's all.
1000625010.korean: 그것보다 이게 더 생존 확률이 높다고 판단했어. 그것 뿐이야.

1000625011.english: Get ready. Break through before the Tyrant catches up to you— Huh?!
1000625011.korean: 슬슬 준비해. 타이런트에게 따라잡히기 전에 돌파- 엇?!

1000625012.english: Thank you. I survived thanks to you.

1000625016.english: You can fly well even in a place like this?

1000625017.english: This much is easy. Is it this way?

1000625018.english: I'm really glad to see you. Did you fix the hologram device?

1000625020.english: That guy... Can you trust the robot named Alfred?
1000625020.korean: 그 아저씨... 알프레드라는 로봇, 믿을 수 있어?

1000625021.english: You too may be being used.

1000625023.english: It's an order. Do not harm me or my men in any way.
1000625023.korean: 명령이야. 나와 대원들에게 그 어떤 위해도 가하지 마.

1000625024.english: Well, let me share the situation. Tell me what you know.
1000625024.korean: 그럼 상황을 공유해줄게. 너희가 알고 있는 걸 말해줘.

1000625026.english: The guy who designed the Tyrant was here.

1000625028.english: You said you had something to do. What are your plans?
1000625028.korean: 해야하는 일이 있다고 했었지. 어떤 계획이야?

1000625029.english: What are you going to do with those earrings?

1000625031.english: So how did you plan on hacking?

1000625032.english: I guess I'll have to walk into the enemy base on foot.

1000625036.english: You said it was the northernmost part of the island?

1000625037.english: There's nothing we can do about it. Let's deal with the search party and move on.
1000625037.korean: 그건 어쩔 수 없지. 수색대를 처리하고 바로 움직이자.

1000625038.english: That robot named Alfred, is it that weird?

1000625039.english: You didn't shoot or anything, did you?

1000625045.english: I heard from Snow Feather that he was going to hack Robert?
1000625045.korean: 스노우 페더한테 들었는데, 로버트를 해킹할 거라며?

1000625047.english: Where is the main body located? What is the security situation?
1000625047.korean: 그 본체가 있다는 곳, 경비 상황은 어때?

1000625051.english: If the hacking is successful, Robert will be destroyed?

1000625052.english: I think this is the only way for now.
1000625052.korean: 지금은 이 방법밖에 없는 것 같아.

1000625057.english: There's only one enemy! Surround them!

1000625058.english: Take cover and back away slowly!

1000625062.english: Alfred! What the hell is that!

1000625064.english: I'm fine! Support the vanilla side!

1000625065.english: The main body is nothing special!

1000625066.english: Can't those guys do things like hacking?
1000625066.korean: 저것들, 해킹 같은 건 못 해?

1000625072.english: Everyone run over there! Harpyia! Fire all missiles!
1000625072.korean: 전부 저기로 달려! 하르페이아! 미사일 전부 퍼부어!

1000625073.english: No, I survived thanks to you. Really.

1000625075.english: Robert, you're commanding the AGS attacking us.
1000625075.korean: 로버트야. 우릴 공격하는 AGS들을 지휘하고 있어.

1000625076.english: Right. Still, I managed to shake off the Tyrant.

1000625080.english: Vanilla is treating it as quickly as possible.

1000625081.english: Can I not be next to Snow Feather?
1000625081.korean: 스노우 페더 옆에 안 있어도 돼?

1000625083.english: I was going to do that anyway.

1000625084.english: Yeah. Elven and Dark Elven, take a break.

1000625087.english: It just so happened to be similar.

1000625089.english: I'll keep going. Snow Feather, can you move?
1000625089.korean: 가면서 계속할게. 스노우 페더, 움직일 수 있겠어?

1000625098.english: They must be trying to stop us.

1000625102.english: I will give you the order. Clear the way for us.

1000625105.english: Take the front line. Calista and Spriggan will support Panther.
1000625105.korean: 최전방을 맡아줘. 칼리스타랑 스프리건은 팬서를 보조해주고.

1000625109.english: When do you think the townspeople will come to their senses?
1000625109.korean: 마을 주민들, 언제쯤 정신을 차릴 것 같아?

1000625110.english: I see you again. Do you remember?

1000625111.english: Yeah, we have to break that.

1000625112.english: Can you take care of the AGS?

1000625116.english: Yeah, it's done. What about you?

1000625118.english: ...What I said last time still holds true.

1000625122.english: Let's go outside first. The other agents...

1000625125.english: I'll pretend I didn't hear it.

1000625126.english: I don't really like such a rigid relationship.
1000625126.korean: 그렇게 딱딱한 관계는 별로 안 좋아해.

1000625129.korean: 우리가 살기 위해 도와주는 것 뿐이야.

1000625131.english: ...Vanilla, will my orders work on Alfred too?

1000625133.english: Don't worry. I'll take a break and go.

1000625134.english: Even if you hadn't told me, that ending would have been inevitable.
1000625134.korean: 네가 말해주지 않았어도 그 결말은 피할 수 없었을 거야.

1000625135.english: If you try to escape alone, you won't last long.

1000625138.english: Yeah, I'll be looking forward to it.

1000625157.english: The commander and his party are on the run.

1000625158.english: The commander and his party continue to flee

1000625159.english: The group gathered around Sunny's hologram hideout

1000625164.english: Gremlins and AGS fighting to protect the port
1000625164.korean: 항구를 지키기 위해 싸우는 그렘린과 AGS들

1000625165.english: - Just as Cerestia said, all the AGSs inside the research facility had ceased functioning.
1000625165.korean: - 연구소 내부에 있던 AGS들은 세레스티아의 말대로 전부 기능이 정지 되어 있었다.

1000625166.english: - As I disarmed them one by one and stepped outside to catch my breath, I heard a familiar sound.
1000625166.korean: - 하나하나 무장을 해제하며 밖으로 나와 한숨을 돌릴 때, 익숙한 소리가 들렸다.

1000625167.english: Commander. It's a relief you're safe.

1000625168.english: Everyone is heading here, but I came first to ensure the commander's safety.
1000625168.korean: 다들 이곳으로 향하고 있지만, 사령관의 안전을 확보하기위해 내가 먼저 왔다.

1000625169.english: After wandering through battlefields for so long, it didn't matter whether it was a snowfield or a forest.
1000625169.korean: 오랫동안 전장을 전전하다보니 눈밭이든 숲 속이든 상관없어지더군.

1000625170.english: Master. For now, the disarmament of the nearby AGS is complete.
1000625170.korean: 주인님. 일단 근처 AGS에 대한 무장해제는 끝났습니다.

1000625171.english: I'm ashamed. It's something we should have done.
1000625171.korean: 면목 없군. 우리가 했어야 하는 일인데.

1000625172.english: No. Your safety is the top priority, Master. In an emergency, I am destined to protect you, regardless of my original role.
1000625172.korean: 아닙니다. 주인님의 안전이야말로 최우선, 유사시에는 원래 역할이 무엇이든 주인님의 보호를 맡게 되어있으니까요.

1000625173.english: Understood. Other units will arrive soon, so we'll cover the rear.
1000625173.korean: 알았다. 곧 다른 부대들이 도착할테니 뒤는 우리가 맡지.

1000625175.english: If you say you are returning immediately, I will form an escort unit.
1000625175.korean: 바로 돌아간다고 하시면 호위 부대를 구성하겠습니다.

1000625176.english: - I look around and see no Cerestia or Black Wyrm.
1000625176.korean: - 주위를 둘러보니 세레스티아와 블랙 웜이 보이지 않는다.

1000625177.english: If it were them, they just went into the forest.
1000625177.korean: 그 분들이라면 방금 전에 숲으로 들어가셨습니다.

1000625178.english: I can still hear the sound. What should I do?

1000625179.english: However, the means to contact them...

1000625181.english: - KeumRan seemed to have realized something and fell silent.
1000625181.korean: - 금란도 무언가 깨달은 듯 입을 다물었다.

1000625182.english: - Soon, the Orca unit members arrived one after another, pushing through the forest.
1000625182.korean: - 곧 숲을 헤치고 오르카 부대원들이 속속 도착했다.

1000625184.english: - They simply divided the personnel and had them search the research facility and the surrounding area.
1000625184.korean: - 간단히 인원을 나눠 연구소와 주변을 수색하게했다.

1000625185.english: - The situation was somewhat resolved and the rest was left to the arriving captains...
1000625185.korean: - 어느정도 상황이 정리되고 나머지는 도착한 대장들에게 맡겼지만...

1000625186.english: - Before my eyes are the destroyed body and core of Robert, moved from inside the laboratory.
1000625186.korean: - 내 눈 앞에는 연구소 내부에서 옮겨온 파괴된 로버트의 본체와 코어가 있다.

1000625187.english: Would you mind if I took a moment? I think I can help you!
1000625187.korean: 잠시 괜찮으시겠습니까? 제가 도움을 드릴 수 있을 것 같군요!

1000625189.english: Ahem... Well, of course I know that Doctor Yang is a very genius Bioroid, but this guy won't be easy even for Doctor Yang.
1000625189.korean: 흠흠... 무, 물론 닥터 양은 굉장히 천재적인 바이오로이드라고 알고 있습니다만, 이녀석은 그런 닥터 양에게도 쉽지 않을겁니다.

1000625190.english: Hmm, you seem to have a lot of trust in Dr. Yang.
1000625190.korean: 흐음, 닥터양에게 아주 큰 신뢰를 보내고 계시군요.

1000625191.english: But there's a good reason for that!

1000625192.english: Didn't I just access Robert's core to hack it a little while ago?
1000625192.korean: 조금 전에 제가 해킹을 위해 로버트의 코어에 접속했지 않습니까?

1000625193.english: Right then! I realized it! The incredible truth...!
1000625193.korean: 바로 그 때! 알아버리고만 것입니다! 어마어마한 사실을...!

1000625194.english: The thing is, Robert's A.I. is extremely twisted.
1000625194.korean: 바로 로버트의 A.I.가 굉장히 뒤틀려 있다는 것입니다.

1000625195.english: Yes, I told you that I was Robert's prototype, right?
1000625195.korean: 그렇습니다. 제가 로버트의 실- 프로토타입이라는 건 말씀드렸지요?

1000625196.english: So, while there may be differences in performance, Robert and I's A.I. structures are very similar.
1000625196.korean: 따라서 성능의 차이는 있을지언정, 저와 로버트의 A.I. 구조는 굉장히 유사합니다.

1000625197.english: In human terms... it's closer than the biological difference between parents and children.
1000625197.korean: 인간으로 따지자면... 부모와 자식간의 생물학적인 차이보다도 가까울 정도입니다.

1000625199.english: As I was hacking and examining it, I found that it was so distorted that it couldn't be considered a normal A.I.
1000625199.korean: 제가 해킹을 진행하며 살펴본 결과, 정상적인 A.I.라고는 볼 수 없을 정도로 뒤틀려있었습니다.

1000625200.english: No... that wasn't even something that could be called A.I.
1000625200.korean: 아니... 그건 이미 A.I.라고 부를수조차 없는 것이었지요.

1000625201.english: That's why it would probably take even Dr. Yang a long time to analyze it!
1000625201.korean: 그렇기때문에 닥터 양 조차도 그걸 분석해내려면 아마 오랜 시간이 걸리실겁니다!

1000625203.english: If you leave it to me! I'll extract all the information remaining on Robert in an instant and present it to you, human!
1000625203.korean: 제게 맡겨주신다면! 순식간에 로버트에게 남아있는 정보를 모~두 추출해 인간님 앞에 대령합지요!

1000625206.english: Oh, that's obvious! Oh, but it's still too much for me to handle alone!
1000625206.korean: 그, 그거야 당연하지요! 아, 아무리 그래도 저 혼자는 버거우니까요!

1000625209.english: I will guide you as soon as Master is ready.

1000625210.english: I will inform the escort unit that we are departing.

1000625212.english: The Commander was right. Look here.

1000625213.english: - In front of the wide open door of the laboratory, there were footprints that looked like they had been there not long ago.
1000625213.korean: - 활짝 열려 있는 연구소의 문 앞엔 생긴지 얼마 안되어 보이는 발자국들이 찍혀 있었다.

1000625214.english: - I walked into the lab following the footprints.
1000625214.korean: - 그 발자국들을 따라 연구실 안쪽으로 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000625218.english: Uh, yeah... It was just a dingy lab...

1000625219.english: - The inside of the lab was filled with greenery, like a botanical garden.
1000625219.korean: - 연구실 안쪽은 마치 식물원처럼 녹음이 가득했다.

1000625220.english: Those you are looking for seem to be inside.
1000625220.korean: 찾으시는 분들은 안쪽에 계시는 것 같습니다.

1000625221.english: - Following KeumRan's guidance, I headed inside the lab.
1000625221.korean: - 금란의 안내를 따라 연구실 안쪽으로 향했다.

1000625222.english: - After passing through a few screens, I found Cerestia walking down the hallway.
1000625222.korean: - 차단문을 몇 개인가 지나고, 복도를 거닐던 세레스티아를 발견했다.

1000625224.english: Just a moment. This is the last one.

1000625225.english: - Before I could ask, Cerestia knelt in front of the tightly closed container.
1000625225.korean: - 내가 묻기도 전에 세레스티아는 굳게 닫혀있는 컨테이너 앞에 무릎을 꿇고 앉았다.

1000625226.english: - As she slowly moved her hand, a small flower bloomed as if by magic.
1000625226.korean: - 그녀가 천천히 손을 움직이자 마법처럼 작은 꽃이 피어났다.

1000625228.english: - I approached Cerestia, who was silently looking down at the flower.
1000625228.korean: - 말없이 그 꽃을 내려다보는 세레스티아의 옆에 다가섰다.

1000625229.english: - The panel attached to the container was still powered on, indicating that the power was still connected.
1000625229.korean: - 아직 전력이 연결되어 있는 모양인지 컨테이너에 붙어있는 패널엔 전원이 들어와있었다.

1000625230.english: - Cerestia opened her mouth as she looked at the face of a Bioroid reflected there and the X-mark drawn as if it were useless.
1000625230.korean: - 그곳에 비춰지는 어떤 바이오로이드의 얼굴과 쓸모없다는듯이 그려져 있는 엑스표를 바라보던 세레스티아가 입을 열었다.

1000625232.english: Because I was inadequate, because I was foolish... I did this to the people who trusted and followed me...
1000625232.korean: 제가 부족해서, 바보같아서... 저를 믿고 따르던 분들을 이렇게...

1000625233.english: - Though on a different scale, she too led a faction and must have borne the weight of countless lives on her shoulders.
1000625233.korean: - 비록 규모는 다르지만 그녀도 세력을 이끌고, 저 어깨에 수많은 목숨을 짊어지고 있었을테지.

1000625234.english: - The sadness she must be feeling right now... is similar to the emotion I’m struggling so hard to avoid.
1000625234.korean: - 지금 그녀가 느끼고 있을 슬픔은... 내가 겪지 않기 위해 발버둥치고 있는 감정과 비슷하다.

1000625236.english: Human... no, compared to the Commander, my responsibility was nothing.
1000625236.korean: 인간님... 아니 사령관님에 비하면 제 책임은 아무것도 아니었지만요.

1000625238.english: - Cerestia reached out and cradled my head in her arms.
1000625238.korean: - 세레스티아가 팔을 뻗어 내 머리를 품에 안았다.

1000625239.english: My experience might be of help to you, Commander.
1000625239.korean: 제 경험이 사령관님에게 도움이 될 수 있을 거예요.

1000625240.english: So that you don't have to go through such sadness.

1000625241.english: - The gentle touch of a hand stroking my head puts my mind at ease.
1000625241.korean: - 부드럽게 머리를 쓰다듬는 손길에 마음이 편안해진다.

1000625242.english: I know how heavy the burden and sense of responsibility must be for you, Commander.
1000625242.korean: 사령관님이 느끼는 고충과 책임감이 얼마나 무거울지 저도 알고 있으니까요.

1000625243.english: If you have any difficulties or concerns, please feel free to tell me anytime.
1000625243.korean: 힘든 일이나 고민이 있으시면 제게 언제든지 말씀해주세요.

1000625245.english: - A Black Wyrm approached us from the inner hallway.
1000625245.korean: - 안쪽 복도에서 블랙 웜이 우리에게 다가왔다.

1000625246.english: Are you here? How are Feather and Sunny?

1000625247.english: He calmed down somewhat. He said he would stay a little longer.
1000625247.korean: 어느정도 진정했습니다. 좀 더 있겠다고 하더군요.

1000625249.english: Oh, are there any side effects?

1000625250.english: Yes. For now, it is fine.

1000625251.english: Because earlier... resisting the brainwashing module.
1000625251.korean: 아까... 세뇌 모듈에 저항한 것 때문에요.

1000625252.english: I thought there might be a slight problem with the emotion module... so I performed first aid.
1000625252.korean: 감정 모듈에 조금 문제가 생겼을 수도 있을 것 같아서... 일단 제가 응급처치를 했어요.

1000625253.english: It seems... the control of the emotion module has weakened or disappeared.
1000625253.korean: 아무래도... 감정 모듈의 제어가 약해졌거나 사라진 것 같습니다.

1000625254.english: - Just as she said, Black Wyrm’s smile seemed much more natural than before.
1000625254.korean: - 그 말대로 블랙 웜의 미소는 이전보다 한결 자연스러워 보였다.

1000625256.english: The children probably need a little more time to compose themselves, so I think it would be best for us to step aside for now.
1000625256.korean: 아이들은 마음을 추스를 시간이 좀 더 필요할테니... 저희는 일단 자리를 비켜주는 게 좋을 것 같아요.

1000625258.english: Hehe, I could do it, but... Commander, please do it.
1000625258.korean: 후후, 제가 해도 되긴 하지만... 사령관님께서 해주세요.

1000625259.english: Because he is Feather's first human master. The same goes for Sunny.
1000625259.korean: 페더에게 처음으로 생긴 인간 주인님이시니까요. 써니한테도 마찬가지구요.

1000625261.english: - Cerestia took my joke lightly and got up from her seat.
1000625261.korean: - 세레스티아는 내 농담을 가볍게 받으며 자리를 털고 일어났다.

1000625262.english: Before I started working under the Commander in earnest, I prepared a gift with my sisters.
1000625262.korean: 본격적으로 사령관님 밑에서 활동하기 전에, 자매들과 함께 선물을 준비했어요.

1000625264.english: Kuhuhu... Good. There's no one here.

1000625265.english: Before the real work begins! I need to get this done with my own hands!
1000625265.korean: 본격적으로 작업이 시작되기 전에! 제 손으로 후딱 해치워버려야겠습니다!

1000625266.english: I can't let this beautiful body fall prey to Dr. Yang's cold-blooded hands! Kuhuhuhuhuhu...
1000625266.korean: 이 아름다운 몸이 닥터 양의 냉혹한 손길에 당하게 둘 수는 없지 않습니까! 쿠후후후후...

1000625267.english: Let's see... Now that we've confirmed that there's no damage to the memory device, let's take a look.
1000625267.korean: 어디보자... 일단 기억 장치에 손상은 없다는 걸 확인했으니, 한 번 들여다 볼까요?

1000625271.english: [Check: Core external damage rate 72%, core internal damage rate... 36%]
1000625271.korean: [점검: 코어 외부 손상률 72% 코어 내부 손상률... 36%]

1000625275.english: [Check: Core external damage rate 87%, core internal damage rate... 0.8%]
1000625275.korean: [점검: 코어 외부 손상률 87% 코어 내부 손상률... 0.8%]

1000625279.english: [Check: Core external damage rate... 96.2% Core internal damage rate... 0.0054%]
1000625279.korean: [점검: 코어 외부 손상률... 96.2% 코어 내부 손상률... 0.0054%]

1000625282.english: [Search: Last command given to A.I. Robert]

1000625283.english: [Confirmation: Order No. 229. Create a weapon to counter the mechanical lifeforms, the "Iron Bugs."]
1000625283.korean: [확인: 명령 제 229호. 기계 생명체, '철충'에 대항할 병기를 만들라.]

1000625287.english: [Execution: Prototype production based on the results from simulations 70000001 through 80000000.]
1000625287.korean: [실행: 제 70000001호 시뮬레이션에서 제 80000000호 시뮬레이션까지의 결과를 토대로한 시제품 제작.]

1000625291.english: [Introduction: Reader Decision Protocol for Emergency Situations.]

1000625294.english: [......Execution: Creating a separate body for independent action.]
1000625294.korean: [......실행: 독립 행동을 위한 별도 소체 제작.]

1000625296.english: Hmm... So this is how I created this beautiful body.
1000625296.korean: 흐음... 이렇게 해서 이 아름다운 몸을 만들게 된 거군요.

1000625297.english: The time zone... hmm. It's not much different from the time I woke up...
1000625297.korean: 시간대는... 으음. 제가 깨어난 시간과 별 차이가 없다니...

1000625298.english: It must be a coincidence... Oh, this is...!

1000625300.english: Confirmed functional cessation of the last individual of prototype 157.
1000625300.korean: 제 157호 프로토타입 중 마지막 개체의 기능 정지를 확인.

1000625301.english: Damage to adjacent Bioroid entities caused by Iron Bugs or prototypes... 0%.
1000625301.korean: 철충, 혹은 프로토타입으로 인한 인접 바이오로이드 개체들의 피해... 0%.

1000625303.english: While collecting the debris, prepare the next simulation in the core.
1000625303.korean: 잔해 수거와 동시에 핵심 코어에서 다음 시뮬레이션을 준비.

1000625304.english: Wait. Let's stop with this useless research.
1000625304.korean: 잠깐. 그런 쓸모 없는 연구는 그만하도록 해요.

1000625305.korean: ......신원 미상 바이오로이드 개체. 신원 조회 개시.

1000625307.english: Ah... This is why robots are so annoying... We need to be able to communicate.
1000625307.korean: 아... 이래서 로봇들은 짜증난다니까... 말이 통해야지 원.

1000625309.english: The bioroid in question has no command authority over the AI robot. Execute existing commands.
1000625309.korean: 해당 바이오로이드 개체에겐 A.I. 로버트에 대한 명령권, 없음. 기존 명령을 수행.

1000625311.english: It looked quite useful, so I wanted to use a peaceful method if possible, but it seems that won't work.
1000625311.korean: 꽤 쓸만해 보여서 가급적 평화적인 방법을 쓰고 싶었는데 안되겠군요.

1000625312.english: Recommend maintaining a safe distance from AI Robert. Unintended damage-
1000625312.korean: A.I. 로버트와의 안전 거리 유지를 권고. 의도치 않은 피해가-

1000625313.english: Personally... I wouldn't even want to use a ill-mannered dog as a soldier.
1000625313.korean: 전 개인적으로... 버릇없는 개는 병사로도 쓰기 싫어요.

1000625314.english: Instead... yeah, a chess piece is enough. No...

1000625317.english: Identify hostile behavior against AI Robert. Threat behavior for warning-
1000625317.korean: A.I. 로버트에 대한 적대 행동을 확인. 경고를 위한 위협 행동을-

1000625318.english: Malicious code intrusion detected in system. Self-verification initiated.
1000625318.korean: 시스템에 악성 코드 침입을 확인. 자가 검증 개시.

1000625319.english: You don't have to chatter like a parrot; I know everything... Hehe.
1000625319.korean: 그렇게 앵무새처럼 떠들지 않아도 다 아는데... 후후.

1000625320.english: Firewall, breached. Antivirus, neutralized. Central core erosion rate... 24%.
1000625320.korean: 방화벽, 돌파됨. 백신, 무력화됨. 중추 코어 침식률... 24%.

1000625321.english: Oh my, you're holding out quite a bit, aren't you?

1000625322.english: As expected, it’s the AI that was rumored to be amazing. This... might be a bit of a waste?
1000625322.korean: 역시 대단하다고 소문났던 A.I.네요. 이거... 좀 아까울지도?

1000625324.english: You should have spoken a little more nicely. Then things wouldn't have gone this far.
1000625324.korean: 그러게 말을 좀 예쁘게 하지 그랬어요. 그러면 이렇게까지는 하지 않았을텐데.

1000625326.english: Malware analysis complete. Severe damage to nearby Bioroid entities is expected.
1000625326.korean: 악성 코드 분석 완료. 인근 바이오로이드 개체들에 대한 심대한 피해가 예상.

1000625327.korean: 자가 파괴 프로토콜 개시. 모든 동력을-

1000625331.english: Ah. Still, seeing you has cheered me up a bit, so I'll do the brainwashing myself.
1000625331.korean: 아아. 그래도 당신을 보고 기분이 좀 풀렸으니까, 세뇌 작업은 제가 직접 해드리죠.

1000625332.english: Hehe, after getting a good nap... shall we be reborn as puppets?
1000625332.korean: 후후, 한 숨 푹~ 자고 나서... 꼭두각시로 새로 태어나도록 해요?

1000625333.english: Central core erosion rate... 97%. Forced reboot sequence progress... 59%.
1000625333.korean: 중추 코어 침식률... 97%. 강제 재부팅 시퀀스 진행률... 59%.

1000625337.english: ...So you had a past like this.

1000625338.english: I don't know what others think, but...

1000625339.english: When I think of the people you have victimized, I simply cannot sympathize with you.
1000625339.korean: 당신에게 희생당한 분들을 생각하면, 전 도저히 당신을 동정하지 못하겠습니다.

1000625341.english: You'd better die two, three more times- Hyaaaaak?!
1000625341.korean: 두 번, 세 번 더 죽는게 좋을 겁니- 흐갸아아악?!

1000625342.english: To think it moved so suddenly... I almost had a heart attack. Even though the AI has been destroyed, the main body's activation algorithm might still be there.
1000625342.korean: 가, 갑자기 움직이다니... 간 떨어질 뻔 했군요. A.I.는 소멸되었어도 본체의 기동 알고리즘은 남아 있는 것일지도 모르겠습니다.

1000625344.english: Kuhuhu... This actually turned out to be even better...! I'll be able to achieve my goal even more easily!
1000625344.korean: 쿠후후... 오히려 더 잘되었습니다...! 제 목적을 더욱 더 쉽게 이룰 수 있겠군요!

1000625345.english: This beautiful body of yours... I shall take it!
1000625345.korean: 당신의 이 아름다운 몸체... 제가 받아가도록 하지요!

1000625350.english: - I was going to rest when I heard a strange laughter and came in to find Alfred there.
1000625350.korean: - 쉬러 가다 이상한 웃음 소리가 들려 들어와보니 알프레드가 있었다.

1000625351.english: Ah, ah...! It's nothing! I just thought of a good solution!
1000625351.korean: 아, 아아...! 별 거 아닙니다! 좋은 해결책이 생각나서 말이지요!

1000625352.english: Sir, this is not the time to waste your time on scrap metal like this.
1000625352.korean: 주인님, 이런 고철에게 시간을 낭비하실 때가 아닙니다.

1000625355.english: Oh, could you bring me the processed AGS? I might find something if I analyze it!
1000625355.korean: 아, 처리한 AGS를 좀 가져다 주시겠습니까? 분석해보면 무언가 나올지도 모르니까요!

1000625358.english: Phew, phew... I almost lost my mind.
1000625358.korean: 휴, 휴우... 간 떨어질 뻔 했군요.

1000625359.english: By the way, the AGSs are restarting...

1000625361.english: It's not because of me, is it...?

1000625362.english: - As I was about to finish my brief command and finish my work, Snow Feather and Sunny appeared in front of me.
1000625362.korean: - 간단히 지휘를 마치고 일을 마저 수습하려던 내 앞에 스노우 페더와 써니가 나타났다.

1000625363.english: - The place they were led to was a forest resort with a cozy-looking cabin wrapped around a large tree and a round swimming pool.
1000625363.korean: - 둘에게 이끌려 온 곳은 커다란 나무에 휘감긴 아늑해보이는 오두막과 둥근 수영장이 있는 숲 속의 휴양지였다.

1000625364.english: I repaired the original one with other people.
1000625364.korean: 원래 있던 걸 다른 분들이랑 수리했어요.

1000625365.english: What do you think? Do you like it?

1000625368.english: It seems like everyone is busy with combat training and preparing for the swimming competition.
1000625368.korean: 전투 수습이랑 수영 대회 준비때문에 다들 바쁜 것 같더라구요.

1000625369.english: I think we should go and help too.
1000625369.korean: 저희도 가서 도와야 할 것 같아요.

1000625372.english: From now on... can I call you master?

1000625374.english: - Snow Feather, who had shown me a bright smile, disappeared into the forest following Sunny.
1000625374.korean: - 내게 환한 미소를 보여준 스노우 페더는 써니의 뒤를 따라 숲 속으로 사라졌다.

1000625375.english: - There's still plenty of time until the swimming competition.

1000625376.english: - This resort prepared by the residents is nice, but you don't have to stay here all the time.
1000625376.korean: - 주민들이 준비해둔 이 휴양지도 좋지만, 꼭 여기에만 있을 필요는 없겠지.

1000625377.english: - Then, what should we do until the swimming competition?

1000625378.english: - It's nice here, but for now, I decided to go back to my familiar room and rest.
1000625378.korean: - 여기도 좋지만, 지금은 익숙한 내 방으로 돌아가 쉬기로 했다.

1000625380.english: - The Orca, having finished maintenance, was floating in the nearby sea.
1000625380.korean: - 정비가 끝난 오르카 호는 근처 바다에 떠있었다.

1000625381.english: - With the help of a nearby crew member, I boarded the Orca and headed to my room along the familiar corridor.
1000625381.korean: - 근처 대원의 도움을 받아 오르카 호에 탑승하고, 익숙한 복도를 따라 방으로 향했다.

1000625382.english: - I briefly looked around the neatly organized desk and was about to lie down on the bed when a knock rang out.
1000625382.korean: - 깨끗하게 정리되어 있는 책상을 잠시 살펴보고 침대에 누우려는 순간 노크 소리가 울렸다.

1000625383.english: - A moment later, the door opened, and an unexpected person cautiously entered the room.
1000625383.korean: - 잠시 후 문이 열리고, 의외의 인물이 조심스럽게 방으로 들어왔다.

1000625385.english: - When I asked her that question, KeumRan hesitated for a moment and couldn’t bring herself to speak.
1000625385.korean: - 내 물음에 금란은 한동안 우물쭈물하며 입을 열지 못했다.

1000625388.english: - Just as KeumRan managed to open her mouth, she uttered something completely unexpected.
1000625388.korean: - 간신히 입을 연 금란에게서 생각지도 못한 말이 나왔다.

1000625390.english: It's not... it's not like that...

1000625391.english: ...Actually, not long ago, when Master lent me his shoulder, I was able to fall asleep really comfortably, even if only for a short while.
1000625391.korean: ...사실, 얼마 전에 주인님께서 어깨를 빌려주셨을 때, 잠깐이지만 정말 편하게 잠들 수 있었습니다.

1000625392.english: - Just before I met Cerestia for the first time, I recalled the image of KeumRan, who had fallen asleep leaning against my shoulder.
1000625392.korean: - 세레스티아를 처음 만나기 직전, 내 어깨에 기대에 잠들었던 금란의 모습이 떠올랐다.

1000625393.english: - They must have already been exhausted even before the series of events began, so there is no need to say more now.
1000625393.korean: - 일련의 사건이 시작되기 전부터 이미 피로가 쌓여 있었던 상황이었을텐데, 지금은 더 말할 필요도 없겠지.

1000625394.english: My humble servant, this is the first time I have slept so peacefully...
1000625394.korean: 소첩, 그렇게 편안하게 잠든 것은 처음이라...

1000625395.english: Um, if Master allows it, this, this time too...

1000625397.english: - KeumRan lay down carefully next to me.

1000625398.english: - As she moved to make room and her arm brushed against me. KeumRan flinched.
1000625398.korean: - 공간을 만들기 위해 움직이다 팔이 닿자 금란이 몸을 움찔 떨었다.

1000625400.english: - I tried to pull away, but KeumRan silently pressed herself even closer to me.
1000625400.korean: - 몸을 떼려 했지만 금란은 말없이 더욱 바짝 몸을 붙였다.

1000625401.english: - As if that weren't enough, KeumRan grabbed my arm, draped it over her shoulder, and slowly caught her breath.
1000625401.korean: - 그걸로도 모자라 내 팔을 붙잡아 자신의 어깨에 두른 금란이 천천히 숨을 골랐다.

1000625402.english: - The body touching through the clothes, the body scent lingering on the bed, the sound of my breathing, and so on.
1000625402.korean: - 옷 위로 맞닿은 몸과 침대에 배어있을 체취, 내 숨소리 등등.

1000625403.english: - Things that others wouldn't even perceive must be painful for KeumRan, who has sensitive senses.
1000625403.korean: - 다른 이들은 인지하지도 못할 것들이 감각이 민감한 금란에게는 고통스러울테지.

1000625404.english: - But KeumRan struggled to keep her eyelids from closing and gave a small smile.
1000625404.korean: - 그러나 금란은 감기는 눈꺼풀을 힘겹게 붙잡으며 작게 웃었다.

1000625408.english: To my humble servant, everything... is so...

1000625411.english: - KeumRan, who had been speaking slowly, soon fell asleep breathing evenly.
1000625411.korean: - 천천히 말을 이어가던 금란은 어느새 고른 숨소리를 내며 잠들었다.

1000625412.english: - Just as KeumRan said, even when I gently hugged her slender body, she showed no signs of pain.
1000625412.korean: - 금란의 말대로 선이 가는 몸을 살짝 껴안아도 고통스러워 하는 기미는 보이지 않았다.

1000625413.english: - I gently brushed back a strand of hair that had fallen over my face and drifted into a peaceful sleep myself.
1000625413.korean: - 얼굴로 흘러내린 머리카락 한 가닥을 조심스럽게 넘겨주고 나도 편안한 잠 속으로 빠져들었다.

1000625414.english: - I told you to rest, but since there was quite a big incident, there must be a lot of work to take care of.
1000625414.korean: - 쉬라고는 했지만 꽤 큰 일이 있었던 만큼 처리할 일이 많겠지.

1000625415.english: - Since I had some free time, I decided to go to the captain's quarters to handle some work.
1000625415.korean: - 시간이 생긴 김에 함장실로 가서 업무를 처리하기로 했다.

1000625417.english: - I sat in the familiar chair in the captain's cabin and turned on the panel.
1000625417.korean: - 익숙한 함장실의 의자에 앉아 패널을 켰다.

1000625418.english: - As expected, there was a pile of work to handle.

1000625419.english: - Just as I stretched and was about to start working, I heard the sound of approaching shoes.
1000625419.korean: - 기지개를 켜고 일을 시작하려는 때, 내게 다가오는 구두 소리가 들렸다.

1000625421.english: - Vanilla nodded slightly, came over, looked at the panel, and frowned.
1000625421.korean: - 작게 고개를 끄덕인 바닐라는 곁으로 다가와 패널을 들여다보곤 얼굴을 찡그렸다.

1000625422.english: Are you planning to work again?

1000625423.english: I heard that the villagers prepared a place for you to rest, Master.
1000625423.korean: 마을 주민들이 주인님을 위해 쉬실 곳을 준비해 줬다고 들었습니다만.

1000625424.english: - Vanilla mercilessly turned off the panel's power.

1000625425.english: Right now, Master, resting is helping.
1000625425.korean: 지금은 주인님께서 쉬시는 게 도와주시는 겁니다.

1000625426.english: I'll take care of it for now, so you go over to that corner over there and get some sleep, Master.
1000625426.korean: 일단 제가 맡을테니, 그동안 주인님은 저기 구석에 가셔서 새우잠이라도 주무시죠.

1000625427.english: - I decided to just go along with it, given Vanilla's fierce determination.
1000625427.korean: - 바닐라의 서슬 퍼런 기세에 얌전히 말을 듣기로 했다.

1000625428.english: - As I lay down on the sofa in the corner of the captain's cabin, contrary to my expectations, I immediately felt sleepy.
1000625428.korean: - 함장실 구석에 마련된 소파에 몸을 눕히자 생각과는 달리 바로 잠이 쏟아졌다.

1000625430.english: - I don't know how long I had been sleeping, but I suddenly came to my senses and opened my eyes to find Vanilla's face right in front of my nose.
1000625430.korean: - 얼마나 자고 있었을까, 문득 정신이 들어 눈을 떠보니 코 앞에 바닐라의 얼굴이 있었다.

1000625433.english: Don't sleep miserably there; go to your room and rest comfortably.
1000625433.korean: 거기서 궁상맞게 주무시지 마시고 방에 가서 편하게 쉬세요.

1000625434.english: - Seeing Vanilla flustered and feeling the lingering warmth on my lips, I couldn't help but smile.
1000625434.korean: - 허둥대는 바닐라의 모습과 입술에 남아있는 온기에 나도 모르게 웃음이 났다.

1000625435.english: Why, why are you laughing in such an unpleasant way?
1000625435.korean: 왜, 왜 그렇게 기분나쁘게 웃으시는 겁니까.

1000625436.english: Let's go. I will escort you.

1000625437.english: - As I was practically dragged back to my room, Vanilla didn't say a word.
1000625437.korean: - 반 강제로 방으로 향하는 동안 바닐라는 입을 열지 않았다.

1000625438.english: - It wasn’t until I reached the door and was about to say goodbye that Vanilla cautiously spoke up.
1000625438.korean: - 문 앞에 도착해 인사를 하려는 때가 되서야 바닐라는 조심스럽게 말을 꺼냈다.

1000625440.english: The island acquisition is almost complete... and once the swimming competition is over, it is our maids' turn to rest.
1000625440.korean: 섬 확보도 끝나가고... 수영 대회도 끝나면 저희 메이드들이 쉴 차례입니다.

1000625444.english: Well, I happened to find an outfit I like this time.
1000625444.korean: 이, 이번에 우연히 마음에 드는 의상을 찾았습니다.

1000625445.english: So, since I have a break, I want to wear that... and try going on a date.
1000625445.korean: 그래서 쉬는 김에, 그걸 입고... 데, 데이트라는 걸 해보고 싶습니다.

1000625446.english: But, Master, aren't you the only person I could ask for something like that?
1000625446.korean: 그, 그런데 제가 그런 걸 부탁할 분은 주인님밖에 안계시지 않습니까?

1000625448.english: Wait... could you spare a moment?
1000625448.korean: 잠깐... 시간 내 주실 수 있으십니까?

1000625450.english: After all, it’s better to have someone like you by my side than to rest alone.
1000625450.korean: 아무래도 혼자 쉬는 것보단 주인님 같은 분이라도 옆에 있는 게 나으니까요.

1000625451.english: Then, please get some good rest.

1000625452.english: - Though she was trying hard to hide it, a smile she couldn’t quite conceal blossomed on the corners of Vanilla’s mouth as she turned away.
1000625452.korean: - 애써 감추려고는 하고 있지만, 돌아서는 바닐라의 입가엔 미처 숨기지 못한 미소가 피어나 있었다.

1000625453.english: - Then, what should we do until the swimming competition?

1000625454.english: - It wouldn't be bad to take a refreshing rest in the forest.
1000625454.korean: - 숲에서 상쾌하게 쉬는 것도 나쁘지 않겠지.

1000625455.english: - I got up from my seat and headed to the nearby forest.

1000625459.english: My whole body hurts so much...

1000625460.english: It makes sense, considering you were so nervous all day.
1000625460.korean: 하루종일 그렇게 긴장하고 있었으니까 그럴만도 하지.

1000625463.english: But... I've never seen you fight so desperately before?
1000625463.korean: 근데... 나는 네가 그렇게 필사적으로 싸우는 건 처음 봤다?

1000625464.english: Of course, that's obvious. If we had fallen, the commander would have been in danger.
1000625464.korean: 다, 당연하잖아. 우리가 쓰러지면 사령관이 위험한 상황이었는데.

1000625465.english: You fought seriously, didn't you? You always say fighting is stress relief and all.
1000625465.korean: 그러는 너도 진지하게 싸웠잖아? 맨날 전투는 스트레스 해소니 뭐니 해놓고선.

1000625466.english: What's the difference between me and you?

1000625467.english: Anyway, I'm really glad the commander is safe.

1000625469.english: Oh, right. When are you going to do that?

1000625471.english: Don't you remember? I asked for a reward while carrying a gun.
1000625471.korean: 기억 안 나? 내가 총대메고 상을 달라고 했잖아.

1000625472.english: Haha, at this point, there's no need for a swimming competition.
1000625472.korean: 후후, 이정도면 수영 대회도 필요 없지.

1000625474.english: Well, the commander needs to rest for a bit too... A little later...
1000625474.korean: 이, 일단 사령관도 좀 쉬어야 할 테니까... 좀 더 나중에...

1000625475.english: Isn't that a relief for the commander?

1000625477.english: Okay, okay. Let's go together later.

1000625478.english: I don't have any strength right now, so I can't handle being a commander.
1000625478.korean: 나도 지금은 힘이 하나도 없어서 사령관 감당 못해.

1000625479.english: - I was walking through the forest at my own pace when I found two elves.
1000625479.korean: - 발걸음 가는 대로 숲속을 걷다 엘프 두 명을 발견했다.

1000625480.english: - After thinking for a moment about what to do, I decided to strike up a conversation.
1000625480.korean: - 어떻게 할까 잠시 생각해보다 말을 걸기로 했다.

1000625483.english: What the heck. I didn't know the Commander would come to us first.
1000625483.korean: 뭐야뭐야. 사령관이 먼저 우리를 찾아올 줄은 몰랐는걸?

1000625484.english: Commander, are you tired too? Come rest with us.

1000625491.english: Take in the forest's energy to your heart's content. Your fatigue will soon disappear.
1000625491.korean: 숲의 에너지를 맘껏 받아들여봐. 피로도 금세 풀릴 거야.

1000625492.english: - I lay down on the makeshift bed made of leaves by Elven and Dark Elven and breathed in the fresh air.
1000625492.korean: - 엘븐과 다크엘븐이 나뭇잎을 깔아 마련해준 간이 침대에 누워 상쾌한 공기를 들이마셨다.

1000625493.english: - A refreshing breeze blowing through the trees tickles my hair.
1000625493.korean: - 나무 사이로 불어오는 상쾌한 바람이 머리카락을 간질인다.

1000625494.english: - Elven, who had been lying on her left side for a while, enjoying the forest, turned to me.
1000625494.korean: - 한동안 왼쪽에 누워서 숲을 만끽하던 엘븐이 내게 몸을 돌렸다.

1000625495.english: You know, Commander. Guess what I'm going to say?
1000625495.korean: 있잖아, 사령관. 내가 지금 무슨 말을 할 지 맞춰볼래?

1000625496.english: Hmm... yes, I am sleeping, but~

1000625497.english: - Elven grabbed my arm and used it as a pillow.
1000625497.korean: - 엘븐이 내 팔을 붙잡고 스스로 팔베개를 했다.

1000625498.english: - Then, the Dark Elven on the other side also hesitated and grabbed my arm.
1000625498.korean: - 그러자 반대쪽에 있던 다크엘븐도 우물쭈물 내 팔을 붙잡았다.

1000625500.english: - As I spread my arms to the sides, the two of them each rested their heads on them.
1000625500.korean: - 내가 팔을 양쪽으로 펼치자 두 명은 각자 머리를 얹었다.

1000625504.english: Commander. Have you spoken to Lady Cerestia?

1000625505.english: - We talked about Elven and Cerestia for a while.
1000625505.korean: - 한동안 엘븐과 세레스티아에 대해 이야기를 나눴다.

1000625506.english: - The Dark Elven, who had been staying quiet without joining the conversation, patted my chest in dissatisfaction.
1000625506.korean: - 대화에 끼지 않고 조용히 있던 다크엘븐이 불만스럽게 내 가슴을 툭 쳤다.

1000625507.english: ...You. Why do you keep talking about unrelated things?

1000625508.english: You're finally getting to rest with us for the first time in a while. Th-but still...
1000625508.korean: 지, 지금 모처럼 우리랑 같이 쉬고 있잖아. 그, 그런데도...

1000625510.english: I guess going through a crisis really is how you grow. That's commendable.
1000625510.korean: 역시 위기를 겪으면 성장하는 법인가봐. 기특한데?

1000625512.english: I completely understand. You almost lost the Commander you truly love, so you can't help but feel that this time together is even more precious.
1000625512.korean: 충분히 이해는 가. 정~말로 사랑하는 사령관을 잃을 뻔 했으니까 같이 있는 이 시간이 더 소중하게 느껴질 수밖에~

1000625514.english: - The Dark Elven's body overlapped me as she tried to stop the Elven from laughing excitedly.
1000625514.korean: - 신나게 웃는 엘븐의 입을 막으려는 다크엘븐의 몸이 내 위로 겹쳐졌다.

1000625516.english: - The Dark Elven blushed and returned to her original place.
1000625516.korean: - 다크엘븐은 얼굴을 붉히며 원래 자리로 돌아갔다.

1000625517.english: Huh? What, are you going down?

1000625519.english: - The Elven clung to me as if taking over from the Dark Elven.

1000625520.english: I'll just stay like this for a little while. That's okay, right?

1000625524.english: - I could feel the tension slowly releasing from the stiff body of the Dark Elven.
1000625524.korean: - 경직됐던 다크엘븐의 몸에서 천천히 긴장이 풀리는 것이 느껴졌다.

1000625525.english: - The Dark Elven carefully rested its head on my chest.
1000625525.korean: - 다크엘븐이 조심스럽게 내 가슴팍에 머리를 얹었다.

1000625526.english: All right, you... I'll just stay like this for a little while...
1000625526.korean: 다, 당신... 나, 조금만 이러고 있을테니까...

1000625528.english: - They may not be real fairies, but I had a relaxing time with the two elves in the forest.
1000625528.korean: - 진짜 요정은 아닐테지만, 숲 속에서 두 엘프와 함께 편안한 시간을 보냈다.

1000625529.english: - I decided to get up from my seat and head to the nearby beach.
1000625529.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 근처 해변으로 향하기로 했다.

1000625531.english: - As I was walking along the nearby beach, a familiar face greeted me.
1000625531.korean: - 근처 해변에 도착해 산책을 하던 때, 익숙한 얼굴이 나를 반겨줬다.

1000625534.english: - Harpyia put a bookmark in the book she was reading and looked at me.
1000625534.korean: - 하르페이아는 읽던 책에 책갈피를 끼우고 나를 보았다.

1000625537.english: - After fingering the spine of a thick book for a moment, Harpyia picked up another book as if she had just remembered something.
1000625537.korean: - 잠시 두꺼운 책의 테두리를 만지작거리던 하르페이아가 문득 생각났다는 듯이 다른 책을 집어들었다.

1000625539.english: Well then... would you like to read this book together?

1000625540.english: - The book Harpyia handed me had a cover on it, so I couldn't see the title.
1000625540.korean: - 하르페이아가 내민 책에는 커버가 씌워져있어 제목이 보이지 않았다.

1000625542.english: It's not difficult content, so you'll be able to read it easily.
1000625542.korean: 어려운 내용은 아니니까 쉽게 읽을 수 있을 거야.

1000625543.english: - As I approached, Harpyia got up from her hammock and moved away.
1000625543.korean: - 내가 다가가자 하르페이아는 해먹에서 일어나 자리를 비켜주었다.

1000625544.english: Hehehe. Just lie down here for now.

1000625545.english: - As I lay down in the hammock as instructed, Harpyia lay down with her back against me.
1000625545.korean: - 말대로 해먹에 몸을 눕히자 하르페이아가 내 앞에 등을 기대고 누웠다.

1000625547.english: Hehehe. Then let's read it quickly.

1000625548.english: - The book was an ordinary romance novel.

1000625549.english: - About halfway through the first chapter, Harpyia turned her head slightly and asked.
1000625549.korean: - 첫 장을 반 정도 읽었을 때 쯤, 하르페이아가 살짝 고개를 돌리며 물었다.

1000625552.english: - Harpyia took one hand off the book and carefully took my hand.
1000625552.korean: - 하르페이아가 책에서 한 손을 떼고 내 손을 조심스럽게 잡았다.

1000625553.english: Every, every time, it's a bit awkward to say it out loud, right? So...
1000625553.korean: 매, 매번 말로 하기는 좀 그렇잖아? 그러니까...

1000625554.english: When you're done reading, hold my hand like this. Okay?
1000625554.korean: 다 읽으면 이렇게, 손을 살짝 잡아줘. 알았지?

1000625555.english: - As I turned my eyes back to the letters, Harpyia kept fidgeting with her fingers.
1000625555.korean: - 내가 다시 활자로 눈을 돌리자 하르페이아는 연신 손가락을 꼼지락거렸다.

1000625556.english: Then you can just read it quickly~

1000625557.english: - The speed at which the pages turned became slower, but reading on the beach with just the two of us was a refreshing experience.
1000625557.korean: - 책장이 넘어가는 속도는 점점 느려졌지만, 단 둘이 즐기는 해변에서의 독서는 신선한 경험이었다.

1000625558.english: - Then what are we going to do until the swimming competition?

1000625559.english: - Since I have some time, I decided to play a game that I've been enjoying lately.
1000625559.korean: - 시간이 난 김에 요새 재미를 붙인 게임을 좀 하기로 했다.

1000625560.english: - Oh, right. Better than doing it alone...

1000625563.english: I never would have thought the commander would handle it personally...

1000625564.english: I finally did one thing this time...
1000625564.korean: 기껏 이번에 한 건 하나 했더니...

1000625566.english: I, I just... I'm glad the Commander is safe.
1000625566.korean: 저, 저는 그냥... 사령관님이 무사하셔서 다행이라고 생각해요.

1000625568.english: Ah, if only I had figured that out sooner...!
1000625568.korean: 아으, 그걸 좀만 더 일찍 알아냈었으면...!

1000625569.english: ...But Yumi, how long are you going to keep doing that?

1000625572.english: Is it swimming practice to toss around in bed like that?
1000625572.korean: 침대에서 그렇게 버둥거리면 수영 연습이 돼?

1000625573.english: Ah, wouldn't it be better than not doing it? I really want to be number one...
1000625573.korean: 아, 안하는 것보단 낫지 않을까요? 꼭 1등하고 싶어서...

1000625574.english: How many kids are good at swimming?

1000625575.english: No, that's fine. I hope it turns out well.
1000625575.korean: 아니, 됐다. 좋은 결과 있길 바랄게.

1000625576.english: Sigh... Today too~ I can't even see the Commander's face, so I'll just~ play a game~
1000625576.korean: 에효... 나는 오늘도~ 사령관님 얼굴도 못 보고 그냥~ 게임이나 해야지~

1000625581.english: - Gremlin's room. When I knocked on the door, I was greeted by a Gremlin and Yumi with surprised faces.
1000625581.korean: - 그렘린의 방, 문을 두드리자 놀란 얼굴의 그렘린과 유미가 맞아주었다.

1000625585.english: - To put it nicely, it was a cluttered room with a lived-in feel. As I stepped inside, Yumi, who had been lying on the bed staring blankly at me, suddenly covered herself with the blanket.
1000625585.korean: - 좋게 말하면 생활감이 있는 어질러진 방 안으로 들어서자, 그때까지도 침대에 누워 나를 멍하니 바라보던 유미가 화들짝 이불로 몸을 가렸다.

1000625586.korean: 사, 사령관님. 여, 여기는 웬일로 오신 거예요...?

1000625588.english: - While I flinched at the more intense reaction than I expected, the two of them approached me with shining eyes.
1000625588.korean: - 생각보다 격렬한 반응에 내가 움찔하는 사이, 둘은 눈을 빛내며 내 앞으로 다가왔다.

1000625589.english: You came here to join us, right?!

1000625591.english: Of course it's Steel Line Online, right? Right? Hehe, there aren't any other games yet!
1000625591.korean: 당연히 스틸라인 온라인이죠? 그렇죠? 헤헷, 딴 게임은 아직 없으니까요!

1000625592.english: Is that unidentified user really the Commander?
1000625592.korean: 그 신원 불명의 유저가 진짜 사령관님 맞나요?

1000625593.english: Oh, but the 3-person queue is a bit ambiguous... Is there anyone else we can call?
1000625593.korean: 아, 근데 3인큐는 조금 애매한데... 누구 더 부를 사람 없나?

1000625594.english: Commander, what is your main character? I-

1000625598.english: - After barely calming them down, I sat down on the floor.
1000625598.korean: - 간신히 둘을 진정시킨 후 적당히 바닥에 앉았다.

1000625599.english: - Only then did I notice Gremlin and Yumi's outfits.
1000625599.korean: - 그제서야 그렘린과 유미의 옷차림이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000625601.english: Okay, wait a minute. Soon- Huh?!

1000625602.english: - Yumi, who was trying to run away, was caught by a gremlin.

1000625603.english: Ahaha. Yumi is doing image training for the swimming competition...
1000625603.korean: 아하핫. 유미는 수영 대회를 대비해서 이미지 트레이닝이랑...

1000625604.english: Practicing for a date with the Commander - Phew.

1000625605.english: - The gremlin fell down after being hit by a pillow thrown by Yumi, whose face turned bright red.
1000625605.korean: - 그렘린은 얼굴을 새빨갛게 물들인 유미가 던진 베개에 맞아 쓰러졌다.

1000625606.english: I was just trying it on to see if it fit.
1000625606.korean: 그, 그냥 잘 맞는지 입어보고 있었어요.

1000625608.english: The Commander doesn't even bat an eye at underwear anymore...
1000625608.korean: 사령관님은 이젠 속옷차림 정도론 눈썹도 까딱 안하게 되셨네요...

1000625612.english: - After hearing my answer, Yumi ran to the bed and covered herself with the blanket.
1000625612.korean: - 내 대답을 들은 유미는 침대로 달려가 이불을 뒤집어썼다.

1000625613.english: It's nothing special. It happens sometimes.

1000625614.english: Commander, then how about we play a duo game while Yumi calms down?
1000625614.korean: 사령관님, 그럼 유미 진정될동안 저랑 듀오 한 판?

1000625615.english: - Yumi quickly came to her senses and joined in starting with the second round.
1000625615.korean: - 곧 정신을 차린 유미는 두 번째 판부터 합류했다.

1000625616.english: - We had a short but enjoyable time bickering during the game and drinking beer that Yumi took out of the fridge.
1000625616.korean: - 게임 도중에 티격태격 하기도 하고, 유미가 냉장고에서 꺼내온 맥주를 마시기도 하며 짧지만 즐거운 시간을 보냈다.

1000625617.english: - I got up from my seat and headed towards where I could hear the voices of the Magical☆Power... no, the magical girls.
1000625617.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 매지컬☆파워... 아니, 마법 소녀들의 목소리가 들리는 곳으로 향했다.

1000625620.english: Since it is perfectly drawn, you will be able to receive the energy of the Magic Gentleman well when performing the ritual.
1000625620.korean: 완벽하게 그려졌으니까 의식을 치를 때 매직 젠틀맨의 기운을 잘 받을 수 있을 거야.

1000625623.english: As expected... maybe the third ritual was too early...
1000625623.korean: 역시... 세 번째 의식은 너무 일렀는지도...

1000625624.english: If you approach the third ritual with such a mindset, only destruction awaits.
1000625624.korean: 그런 마음가짐으로 세 번째 의식에 임한다면 기다리고 있는 것은 파멸 뿐.

1000625625.english: I'll give you one last chance. If you're going to give up, now is your only chance.
1000625625.korean: 마지막으로 기회를 주겠어. 포기하려면 지금 뿐이야.

1000625628.english: I also... to the Magic Gentleman...

1000625630.english: M-Gentleman...? How did you get here...?

1000625631.english: - I headed toward the sound of familiar voices, but the sight was so shocking that I involuntarily let out a scream.
1000625631.korean: - 익숙한 말소리가 들려오는 곳으로 향했다가 너무나 충격적인 광경에 나도 모르게 비명을 지르고 말았다.

1000625633.english: I definitely set up a barrier...

1000625634.english: I see. The moon's power has weakened because the time of the ritual is approaching.
1000625634.korean: 그렇군. 의식의 때가 가까워져서 달의 힘이 약해진거야.

1000625635.english: Faucre, I'm sorry. I can't dawdle any longer.
1000625635.korean: 뽀끄루, 미안해. 더 이상 꾸물댈 수 없겠어.

1000625637.english: Magic Gentleman. Nice to meet you.

1000625638.english: It might be sudden, but please perform the ritual for Faucre and the Third Moon.
1000625638.korean: 갑작스럽겠지만, 뽀끄루와 세 번째 달의 의식을 치러줘.

1000625642.english: BaekTo, who was stubbornly trying to make us perform the third ritual, eventually returned with a relieved expression only after Faucre and I swore in the name of the moon that we would perform the ritual.
1000625642.korean: - 막무가내로 세 번째 의식을 치르게 하려는 백토는 결국 뽀끄루와 내가 의식을 치르겠다고 달의 이름으로 맹세를 한 후에야 후련한 표정으로 돌아갔다.

1000625644.english: I-I'm so sorry... I didn't mean to do this...

1000625646.english: The thing is... BaekTo said he prepared a swimsuit for me...
1000625646.korean: 그게요... 백토가 저를 위해 수영복을 준비해줬다고 했는데...

1000625647.english: The talismans plastered all over Faucre's body do not look like a swimsuit no matter how you look at them.
1000625647.korean: - 뽀끄루의 몸에 덕지덕지 붙어있는 부적은 아무리 봐도 수영복으로는 보이지 않는다.

1000625648.english: "After all, swimsuits are meant to bring men and women together..." she said, adding that she would let us perform the third-month ritual while we were at it...
1000625648.korean: 수영복은 결국 남녀가 맺어지기 위해 입는 거라면서... 이참에 세 번째 달의 의식을 치를 수 있게 해주겠다고...

1000625649.english: This... they say it's a talisman that weakens magical powers before performing a ritual...
1000625649.korean: 이건... 의식을 치르기 전에 매지컬 파워를 약화시키는 부적이래요...

1000625650.english: I reached out my hand to Faucre, who was explaining diligently while half-sobbing.
1000625650.korean: - 반쯤 울먹이면서도 착실하게 설명을 하는 뽀끄루에게 손을 내밀었다.

1000625653.english: Faucre took my hand as if she had made a decision.
1000625653.korean: - 뽀끄루는 무언가 결심한듯 내 손을 잡았다.

1000625654.english: I heard that if you break an oath sworn in the name of the moon, something terrible will happen.
1000625654.korean: 다, 달의 이름으로 맹세한 걸 어기면 크, 큰일이 난다고 하더라구요.

1000625657.english: ...I, I'm sorry. I guess I'm not quite ready yet...

1000625658.english: Heehee... I'm going to get scolded really hard by BaekTo...

1000625659.english: It took half a day to calm down the sobbing Faucre, and just as much time to persuade the furious BaekTo.
1000625659.korean: - 울먹이는 뽀끄루를 진정시키는데에는 반나절이 걸렸고, 잔뜩 화가 난 백토를 설득하는 데에도 그만큼의 시간이 걸렸다.

1000625660.english: - Really... I can't understand magical girls...

1000625661.english: - Then, what should we do until the swimming competition?

1000625663.english: - I walked toward where the team members who had been of great help this time might be.
1000625663.korean: - 이번에 큰 도움을 받았던 대원들이 있을만한 곳으로 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000625665.english: What's going on? Isn't she out yet?

1000625666.english: He's not budging... Captain, do something about this.

1000625668.english: Io. We have to go to the Commander, so hurry up and come out.

1000625669.english: B-but... I couldn't do anything this time...
1000625669.korean: 그, 그렇지만... 이번에 저는 아무것도 못했어요...

1000625670.english: While everyone else is fighting hard... I...

1000625671.english: We did your share too, so stop feeling down and come out.
1000625671.korean: 네 몫까지 우리가 했으니까 궁상 그만 떨고 나와.

1000625674.english: Spriggan. What was the most important thing I taught you?
1000625674.korean: 스프리건. 내가 제일 중요하게 가르치는 게 뭐였냐.

1000625675.english: Share the achievements, but take responsibility alone~

1000625676.english: Yeah. If you haven't forgotten what I've said a hundred times, then come out quickly.
1000625676.korean: 그래. 내가 백 번도 넘게 얘기한 거 그새 까먹은 게 아니면 얼렁 나와.

1000625680.english: Okay... Then, in the meantime, let's decide on the order.
1000625680.korean: 자... 그럼 그동안 우리는 순서나 정하자.

1000625682.english: - As expected, the Armored Maiden was in the dorm. But...
1000625682.korean: - 예상대로 아머드 메이든은 숙소에 있었다. 그런데...

1000625688.english: It was a good thing I was just about to go see the commander.
1000625688.korean: 마침 사령관님을 찾아가려 하던 참이었는데 잘 됐지 말임다.

1000625690.english: Hey, why are you like that? Didn't you promise?

1000625692.english: As I said, Commander and we all returned safely.
1000625692.korean: 제가 말씀드린 대로 사령관님과 저희 모두 무사히 돌아왔지 말임다.

1000625693.english: Oh, do you happen to not have time?

1000625694.english: As expected, Commander, don't be so hot-tempered.

1000625695.english: What? Hey, you still haven't changed?

1000625696.english: How about it? Do you still want to have the captain at your feet?
1000625696.korean: 어때? 아직도 대장을 네 발 밑에 두고 싶어?

1000625698.english: Well, it's okay to be a little further down the line.
1000625698.korean: 뭐, 조금은 대장 밑에 더 있어도 괜찮겠네.

1000625700.english: What is it? Why are you laughing?

1000625701.english: What are you doing? The Commander is waiting.

1000625703.english: - I decided to just rest here and lay down on the chair.
1000625703.korean: - 그냥 여기서 쉬기로 마음 먹고 의자에 몸을 눕혔다.

1000625704.english: - I must have been tired too, because when I was about to surrender to the water, I felt someone approaching.
1000625704.korean: - 나도 역시 피로가 쌓였었는지, 수마에 몸을 맡기려는 때에 누군가 다가오는 인기척이 느껴졌다.

1000625705.english: - I decided to get up from my seat and go greet the adjutant.
1000625705.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 부관을 맞이하러 가기로 했다.

1000625706.english: Orca yearns! I'm Orca's Spriggan reporter at twelve o'clock!
1000625706.korean: 오르카는 갈망한다! 열두 시 내 오르카의 스프리건 기자입니다!

1000625707.english: Today, I greet you as the host of the 1st Orca Swim Competition, sponsored by the Commander!
1000625707.korean: 오늘은 사령관님께서 후원하시는, 제 1회 오르카 수영 대회의 사회자로 인사드립니다!

1000625708.english: As you all know! The product is!

1000625709.english: A private date with the Commander!

1000625710.english: - I sat in my assigned seat and waved to the members who were screaming and cheering for me.
1000625710.korean: - 마련된 자리에 앉아 비명을 지르며 나를 연호하는 대원들에게 손을 흔들어 주었다.

1000625712.english: As previously announced, you are free to share the one-week period with a close friend!
1000625712.korean: 미리 공지된대로, 1주일의 기간을 친한 분과 나누어 쓰는 것은 자유!

1000625713.english: However, we would like to inform you once again that, for the sake of the Commander's condition, spending time with multiple people on the same day is prohibited!
1000625713.korean: 단, 사령관님의 컨디션을 위해 같은 날, 여럿이 시간을 보내는 것은 금지되어 있다는 것을 다시 한 번 알려드립니다!

1000625715.english: Because Your Majesty needs to rest too.

1000625716.english: Based on the analysis by myself, Ms. Daphne, and Doctor, it is expected that in normal cases, up to four minutes a day will have no effect on His Majesty's condition.
1000625716.korean: 저와 다프네 양, 닥터 양의 분석 결과 일반적인 경우 하루에 네 분까지는 폐하의 컨디션에 전혀 영향이 없을 것으로 예상되지만,

1000625717.english: Since it's a vacation, I think it would be best to get some rest.
1000625717.korean: 휴가이니만큼 아무래도 푹 쉬시는 게 좋을 것이라고-

1000625720.english: - Armand posted the payment documents on the panel.

1000625722.english: These documents are, after all, mere formalities. His Majesty's word is law.
1000625722.korean: 이런 서류야 결국 형식적인 것. 폐하의 말씀이 곧 법이니까요.

1000625723.english: - In that case... I can see the anticipation of the members gathered in groups of three or five talking.
1000625723.korean: - 그러기엔... 삼삼오오 모여 이야기하는 대원들의 기대에 찬 모습이 눈에 밟힌다.

1000625726.english: Oh, and there's something that was added just before the game.
1000625726.korean: 아, 그리고 경기 직전에 추가된 사항이 있는데요.

1000625727.english: According to Armand's analysis, if multiple people compete like in a regular swimming competition!
1000625727.korean: 아르망님의 분석 결과, 일반적인 수영 대회처럼 여럿이서 경쟁을 하게 될 경우!

1000625728.english: There's a 99.3% chance that it will be a mixed martial arts competition, not a swimming competition!
1000625728.korean: 99.3%의 확률로 수영 대회가 아닌 이종 격투기 대회가 될 것이라는 예측이 나왔습니다!

1000625729.english: Because of that, we'll change the format of the game to one player at a time! We'll measure your time from the start to the finish!
1000625729.korean: 그 때문에 경기 방식은 한 번에 한 명씩! 시작 지점부터 결승점까지의 기록을 재는 것으로 변경하도록 하겠습니다!

1000625731.english: Captain, let's go without wasting our energy. We'll have to find another way.
1000625731.korean: 대장, 괜히 힘 빼지 말고 가죠. 다른 방법을 찾아봐야 겠습니다.

1000625733.english: You said you'd make sure we win!

1000625734.english: Ah, this is...! Those with dark intentions are giving up on the game one after another...!
1000625734.korean: 아아, 이런...! 검은 속내를 가지고 있었던 분들이 연이어 경기를 포기하고 있습니다...!

1000625735.english: City Guard Team. Are you organized? Okay.

1000625737.english: A swimming competition with huge prizes up for grabs!
1000625737.korean: 어마어마한 상품이 걸려 있는 수영 대회를!
